properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine’s top strike-drone maker moves into ballistic missile defense
properties.descricao: Fire Point's drones already fly most of Kyiv's strikes inside Russia. With Germany's Hensoldt, the company is now building Freyja, a homegrown alternative.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine’s newest strike weapon drifts into Russia on the wind
properties.descricao: The U.S. and Russia are fielding the same balloons used by Ukraine that bait air defenses and now launch missiles.

properties.titulo_evento: Philippines deploys US-made Triton naval drones in its western waters to scout for intruders
properties.descricao: The transfer comes after the military revealed that China discreetly deployed a 6x6 meter floating platform equipped with an antenna at Scarborough Shoal.

properties.titulo_evento: Poland buys V-BAT drones to boost Baltic Sea naval operations
properties.descricao: The deal puts Poland in line to become the first country on NATO’s eastern flank to acquire the Shield AI-made drone.

properties.titulo_evento: White House asks Congress for $87.6 billion, mostly for Iran war
properties.descricao: The request includes $67.15 billion for the military, including $21 billion for munitions and to strengthen the U.S. industrial base.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany scraps F126 frigate program, pivots to MEKO warships amid cost and contractor chaos
properties.descricao: Germany Navy leaders have already blessed the fallback ships as capable of meeting NATO capability requirements, but an alliance deadline looms.

properties.titulo_evento: Tank maker KNDS plans stock market listing, Germany to buy 40% stake
properties.descricao: The firm showed a proposed battle tank at Eurosatory defense exhibition in Paris boasting a French turret and gun mounted on a German Leopard 2 chassis.

properties.titulo_evento: US Senate joins House in voting to halt Iran war
properties.descricao: It marks the first time both chambers approved directing a president to remove armed forces from hostilities since the War Powers Act was adopted in 1973.

properties.titulo_evento: Open Strait, Unsettled Waters

properties.titulo_evento: The U.S. Navy’s Subsea Rare Earth Vulnerability
properties.descricao: The Columbia-class ballistic missile submarine is the next generation of American nuclear deterrence. Twelve of these boats will replace the aging Ohio-class fleet, entering service over the 2030s and 2040s, each carrying 16 Trident IIs and driven...

properties.titulo_evento: From Vietnam to Iran: Wartime Diplomacy and Secret Deals
properties.descricao: Wars rarely end in a single act of diplomacy. More often, they pass through a succession of ceasefires, frameworks, understandings, as well as provisional and even secret arrangements before anyone can determine whether peace is actually at hand. ...

properties.titulo_evento: Hundreds trapped beneath buildings a day after Venezuela’s twin earthquakes
properties.descricao: Emergency crews are racing to rescue hundreds trapped under collapsed buildings after earthquakes struck Venezuela.

properties.titulo_evento: France seizes fifth Russian ‘shadow fleet’ tanker linked to Ukraine war
properties.descricao: France seizes fifth Russian ‘shadow fleet’ tanker linked to funding Ukraine war.

properties.titulo_evento: Plan Intl: ‘Mental health impact of Venezuelan quakes can last for years’
properties.descricao: Plan International said children and young people must be at the centre of Venezuela's earthquake response.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: Israel attacks Lebanon as Netanyahu says troops to stay
properties.descricao: Israeli leader says military to stay in occupied areas of southern Lebanon 'as long as necessary', despite US-Iran deal.

properties.titulo_evento: UN: Venezuela earthquakes will deepen already severe humanitarian crisis
properties.descricao: The UN says it is scaling up its response after twin earthquakes devastated Venezuela.

properties.titulo_evento: Pepe’s brace sends Ivory Coast to first knockouts as Curacao exit World Cup
properties.descricao: The West Africans will face the second-place finisher between France and Norway in Group I on Tuesday in Texas.

properties.titulo_evento: Ecuador edge Germany 2-1 to squeeze into World Cup last 32
properties.descricao: Germany finish top of Group E, with Ivory Coast second and Ecuador will have a chance of qualifying on third place.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela earthquakes live: Rescue efforts intensify as death toll hits 235
properties.descricao: Residents are trapped beneath rubble of collapsed buildings after two major quakes hit Venezuela, killing at least 235.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela rescue teams race to find earthquake survivors
properties.descricao: Rescue teams raced to find survivors and recover bodies after twin earthquakes rocked Venezuela on Wednesday.

properties.titulo_evento: Economic losses mount as Venezuela earthquake death toll grows
properties.descricao: Initial forecasts suggest damage could cost as much as 7 percent of the South American nation's GDP.

properties.titulo_evento: UN agency pauses Hormuz ship evacuation initiative after vessel attacked
properties.descricao: Iran warns vessels to use only Tehran-approved routes as IMO halts Hormuz evacuation after ship struck.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela quake leaves La Guaira in almost total devastation
properties.descricao: La Guaira, the region hardest hit by two earthquakes in Venezuela, has been left devastated.

properties.titulo_evento: ‘Truly terrifying’: Caracas confronts the aftermath of Venezuela earthquake
properties.descricao: Devastated residents recall the moment when they experienced the twin earthquakes that toppled buildings and killed 188.

properties.titulo_evento: Rescuers search rubble for survivors as Venezuela earthquakes kill at least 235
properties.descricao: Nearly 1,500 people have been injured after two seven-plus magnitude shallow quakes hit seconds apart.

properties.titulo_evento: Earthquake is devastating blow to Venezuela at time of uncertainty
properties.descricao: The twin quakes come less than six months after Venezuela's then-leader Nicolás Maduro was seized by US forces.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump asks Congress for billions for Iran war, after tension with Republicans
properties.descricao: But the budget faces an uphill battle as the president spars with some members of his own party over the issue.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil price falls back to pre-Iran war levels
properties.descricao: Signs that traffic through the key Strait of Hormuz shipping route is gradually resuming has helped to push the oil price down.

properties.titulo_evento: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
properties.descricao: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.

properties.titulo_evento: Biggest city in Crimea without power after Ukraine strikes
properties.descricao: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.

properties.titulo_evento: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites as part of war deal
properties.descricao: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian  minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela: 235 dead in devastating, back-to-back earthquakes
properties.descricao: Venezuela's health minister said at least 235 people have died after two strong earthquakes rattled the capital and surrounding regions. DW has the latest.

properties.titulo_evento: King Charles won’t live in Buckingham Palace, reveals taxes
properties.descricao: Buckingham Palace has been the British monarch’s official residence in London for nearly two centuries. But royal officials say King Charles and Queen Camilla won’t reside there.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran: UK Navy reports cargo vessel hit in Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: The reported attack has caused the UN maritime agency to halt its evacuations of seafarers stranded in the Gulf. Meanwhile, Rubio is finishing up his Mideast tour. Follow DW for more.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine, Poland smooth over WW2 dispute at Gdansk aid forum
properties.descricao: Ukraine and its European allies are looking to encourage investment in Kyiv's post-war recovery. The first tranche of an EU loan has already arrived with more deals on the table. But relations with Poland are strained.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany: Racism is almost a daily reality for Muslims
properties.descricao: Insults, discrimination, violence, deaths: Experts warn of growing anti-Muslim racism in Germany — and criticize policymakers.

properties.titulo_evento: Fact check: No, Zelenskyy wasn't killed in a Russian airstrike
properties.descricao: Amid a flare-up in violence between Russia and Ukraine, viral posts claim Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has died. DW Fact check takes a closer look.

properties.titulo_evento: Europe heat wave: No respite as extreme heat continues
properties.descricao: Some 101 million people in Europe will likely see temperatures above 35 C on Thursday, an analysis shows. And Germany is expecting things to warm up even more. DW has the latest.

properties.titulo_evento: Why is Germany taking a big stake in a major tankmaker?
properties.descricao: The German government will buy a 40% stake in tankmaker KNDS. The deal is as much about control in the critical defense sector as it is about the Franco-German relationship.

properties.titulo_evento: What Keir Starmer's resignation means for European security
properties.descricao: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer was widely known for his support of Ukraine and his efforts towards a new EU–UK defense partnership. What will happen to those policies now that Starmer has announced his resignation?

properties.titulo_evento: Far-right German lawmaker faces scrutiny after photo appears to show Nazi salute
properties.descricao: It’s unclear whether the revelation will dent the AfD’s large lead in polls ahead of key state elections in eastern Germany.

properties.titulo_evento: Hormuz evacuation effort on hold after new ship attack
properties.descricao: The vessel was attacked after Iran warned ships must use its designated corridors through the Strait of Hormuz rather than the route the U.S. has backed.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil falls below $75 per barrel for first time since start of Iran war
Inflation Accelerated in May as Iran War Pushed Up Prices
properties.descricao: A closely watched measure of inflation ticked up as the conflict in the Middle East inflated energy prices.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran Strikes Ship in Strait of Hormuz, Undermining Efforts to Restore Traffic
properties.descricao: The attack, confirmed by U.S. and Iranian officials, came after Tehran threatened to disrupt shipping in the waterway and as Washington sought regional support for its peace agreement.

properties.titulo_evento: Lesson Learned From Iran War: Reduce Reliance on Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: Increased stockpiles, more pipelines and other tactics could loosen the waterway’s stranglehold on the global economy.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil Prices Jump After Attack Halts Shipping in Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: Oil prices fell, moving closer to levels not seen since the war in Iran began in February.
